summary: The existing brand signals lean toward a clean blue SaaS identity with restrained Helvetica/Avenir typography, so the rebuild should keep the cool signature blue palette and gentle polish while modernizing layout, spacing, and components.
classification: clean, trustworthy SaaS with crisp blue energy
